language.string:
<color=1.0, 1.0, 0.0>Civilization bonus:</color>
Start with a Scout Uhlan and a Cow. Outposts and forts can ship a group of military units.
<color=1.0, 1.0, 0.0>Royal guard units:</color>
Scout Uhlan (Krakus), Scytheman (Partisan Scytheman)
<color=1.0, 1.0, 0.0>Unique units:</color>
Scythemen, Piechurs, Dziesietniks, Scout Uhlans, Companions, Lisowczyky, Tabors
<color=1.0, 1.0, 0.0>Unique buildings:</color>
Folwarks, Royal Stables
Constitution of the Duchy of Warsaw
Ships a regiment of musket-armed Foot Guards.
Provides your Church with unique Polish improvements.
Ships a regiment of musket-armed Foot Guards. Foot Guards can be trained at Forts and Barracks.
Sends 1 Piechur for each existing house and 4 Scythemen for each existing folwark and estate. Up to a maximum of 15 of each. All Infantry train faster.
Ships 2 Tabors, war wagons able to transport units and fortify positions, and unlocks them at the Artillery Foundry.

You send a detachment of 3 winged hussars to help your besieged allies ! You personally receive an auxiliary force sent by the Holy League, consisting of 3 Winged Hussars, 3 Doppelsoldners of the Holy Roman Empire and 3 Pavisiers from the Republic of Venice.
Jan Tarnowski turns all existing Falconets into Horse Artillery and makes Horse Artillery train faster. Allows Jan Tarnowski to train Horse Artillery.
Tarnowski's artillery tactics have been implemented.
Ships Stanislaw Zolkiewski, a powerful hetman who can receive Shipments and train Age 2 units.
Crown Hetman and hero of the tatar wars. Able to train your Age 2 units and inspire nearby allies.
Ships Jan Tarnowski, a powerful hetman who can receive Shipments and unlocks a fixed assortment of Mercenaries at the Tavern, which he can also train himself.
Famed military tactician and Grand Hetman. Able to train Mercenaries and inspire nearby allies.
Ships King John III Sobieski, monarch of the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, who can receive Shipments and train cavalry units. Counts as a powerful hetman.
King of Poland. Can train troops and receive Shipments. Also gives nearby troops extra hitpoints. Counts as a powerful hetman.
Passive Ability: Your Hetman increases the attack of nearby units.
Passive Ability: Prove your worth to the king ! All nearby units gain extra speed and attack faster.
Economic building that combines Mill and Livestock Pen.
Scout Uhlan attack and hitpoints increased.
Scout Uhlan attack and hitpoints increased.
Scout Uhlan attack and hitpoints increased.
Upgrades Lipka Tatars to Veteran as well as units of the House of Vasa and Jagiellon
Upgrades Winged Hussars and Lipka Tatars to Guard as well as units of the House of Vasa and Jagiellon
Powerful but expensive ranged cavalry. Good again cavalry.
Unlocks some units and technologies from the Vasa and Jagiellon houses in the royal stable. Winged Hussars and Lipka Tatars cost population when acquired from the Royal Stable.
Stable with units and technologies from the royal houses of Poland-Lithuania. Supports 5 population.
Scytheman attack, hitpoints and speed increased.
Scytheman attack, hitpoints, speed and damage area increased.
Scytheman attack, hitpoints and speed increased.
Weak but cheap skirmisher and counter skirmisher. Good against ranged cavalry and all types of infantry.
Partisan with low hitpoints but equipped with a scythe which deal area damage.
Polish halberdier. Heavy hand infantry with a good resistance.
Fast lancer with a good line of sight. Good against infantry and artillery.
Sends to your Home City Gather Point 1 Scout Uhlan and 2 Piechurs for each Outpost you own. Up to a maximum of 10 of each.
Sends to your Home City Gather Point 1 Compagnon and 2 Dziesietniks for each Outpost you own. Up to a maximum of 10 of each.
Sends to your Home City Gather Point 4 Scout Uhlans and 4 Companions for each Fort you own. Up to a maximum of 12 of each.
A powerful raider that strikes fear into villagers.

The infamous warband takes up arms ! Ships 5 Lisowczyky and turns all your Dragoons and Cavalry Archers from Eastern Europe into Lisowczyky, bloodthirsty raiders especially good at sieging buildings and killing villagers, with a special fear aura. (Transforms : Companion, Lipka Tatar, Dragoon, Cavalry Archer and Tatar Archer.)
Passive Ability: Reduces the speed of nearby enemy villagers by 15%.
War wagon that can transport infantry and fortify positions.
When in Bombard mode, loses most of its movement but gains Deflection (Absorbs 25% of the damage caused to nearby allies) and increases nearby blackpowder units' attack speed by 5%.
A Winged Hussar with a charged pistol attack.
Ships a number of Scout Uhlans and increases their damage against infantry.
Ships a regiment of musket-armed Foot Guards from the homeland and enables them in Forts.
Grants a steady trickle of food. Villagers gather food faster from Folwarks and Herdables.
You can now train cows from Folwarks.
Folwarks, cows and sheeps trickle a small amount of Gold.
Attack increased for Piechurs and Companions.
Improves cavalry train time and slightly improves infantry train time.

Ships a Winged Hussar and his retinue. Ships different units each time in the following order:
 • 1 Winged Hussar and 5 Lipka Tatars
 • 1 Winged Hussar and 6 Scout Uhlans
 • 1 Winged Hussar and 4 Companions
Ships 5 Hajduks and 5 Pandours. Counter skimishers, especially Piechurs, do more damage and have more range and line-of-sight.
Counter Skirmisher +1 Range and +2 Line-of-sight.\n • Extended bonuses for Piechurs
Improves your Polish Explorer and your Hetmans in combat. Explorers and Hetmans trickle a small amount of Gold.
All your Villagers turn into Scythemen. Removes the wood cost of Scythemen in exchange for an additional food cost. Improves Scythemen train time.
Delivers 9 Cossack Daredevils. Enable Cossack Daredevils hiring at Taverns, Outposts and Royal Stables. Cossack Daredevils cost less population.
Outlaw-type units cost less population and train faster.
Ships a powerful bear hero which becomes more powerful at the following ages.
Outposts have more hitpoints, and you can call out Eastern and Southern Border Defense Units a second time.
All cavalry attack and hitpoints increased.
Reduces food costs for all cavalry units in the royal stable. Especially elite cavalry.
You get a Shipment of Native Warriors from each different allied tribe. Native warriors are less expensive.
Ships 15 Lisowczyky, bloodthirsty raiders especially good at sieging buildings and killing villagers, with a special fear aura.
Ships 5 Lisowczyky, bloodthirsty raiders especially good at sieging buildings and killing villagers, with a special fear aura.
Ships 3 Privateers and enables them to be trained at the dock.
Increases Scout Uhlan and Lisowczyky siege damage. Scout Uhlans also deal more damage to villagers.
Lipka Tatars' ranged attack gains a bonus against Heavy Infantry.
Companions and Piechurs gain a bonus against Ranged Cavalry.
Ships 5 Winged Pistoleers and enables them in Royal Stables.
Ships two Leather Cannons and enables them to be trained in limited numbers at the Artillery Foundry.
Improves artillery units unlocked by the home city and increase their train limit.
King of Poland. Sobieski is an able military leader, most famously for his victory over the Ottoman Empire at the Battle of Vienna.
